rule: The current middle-layer PNG is the geometry authority. Slot JSON must be captured from this PNG. Generated SVG/PNG from numeric truth is future-state only and must not replace this authority until explicitly promoted.
notes: Use the transparent PNG as the shared middle layer for Game 1 and Game 2.
Use the high-contrast JPEG as the visual measuring reference.
Do not tune Game 2 bracket items against guessed layout values; tune against slots captured from this image authority.
